items.title: AI uses less water than the public thinks
Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.
items.summary: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. Musk’s argument against OpenAI? By converting the company to a for-profit model, Sam Altman betrayed the “nonprofit for the […]

items.title: Ubuntu infrastructure has been down for more than a day
items.summary: The outage has hampered communication concerning a critical vulnerability that gives root.

items.title: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
